intro: End-to-end cloud engineering for startups that need to move fast without accumulating infrastructure debt.

services.title: Cloud Architecture
services.description: VPC design, IAM policies, multi-environment account structure. AWS-first, GCP available. Right-sized for your stage — no over-provisioning.

services.title: CI/CD Pipelines
services.description: GitHub Actions workflows that lint, test, build, and deploy on every push. Zero-downtime deploys with health checks from day one.

services.title: Infrastructure as Code
services.description: Terraform or Pulumi modules for repeatable, version-controlled infrastructure. Remote state, workspaces, and secrets management.

services.title: Containers & Orchestration
services.description: Dockerised services on ECS Fargate, lightweight Kubernetes, or Fly.io for cost-conscious teams. Matched to your scale and budget.

services.title: Monitoring & Alerting
services.description: Observability from day one — structured logs, metrics dashboards, uptime alerts, and on-call runbooks your team can actually follow.

services.title: Cost Optimisation
services.description: Audit unused resources, right-size instances, implement spot/preemptible strategies, and plan reserved capacity before your AWS bill surprises you.

services.title: Security Hardening
services.description: Least-privilege IAM, secrets management, WAF setup, dependency scanning, and SAST pipeline integration. Secure by default, not bolted on after.

services.title: Open-Source Stacks
services.description: Rust/Axum, Python/FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLite, React — production setups with open-source tooling. No managed-service lock-in required.
